title: Wicked Diary Set for Girls – Official Wizard of Oz Notebook with Pens Stickers & Sticky Notes – Kids Stationery Gift Set for Writing Journaling Drawing – Christmas Stocking Filler Ages 5+
features: OFFICIAL WICKED STATIONERY SET: Bring the magic of Wicked and the Wizard of Oz to life with this premium diary set, featuring exclusive artwork, themed accessories and enchanting character designs.

COMPLETE JOURNALING KIT FOR KIDS: Includes a hard-cover Wicked diary with lined pages, 3 colourful gel pens with decorative toppers, a full sticker sheet, green witch hat sticky notes and embellishments for personalisation.

INSPIRES CREATIVITY & SELF-EXPRESSION: Perfect for writing, drawing, journaling, list-making and imagination-led play. Encourages children to express their thoughts, ideas and creativity in a fun magical way.

PERFECT GIFT FOR GIRLS AGES 5+: Packed in a 20cm x 20cm gift box, making it ideal for birthdays, Christmas, party bags, stocking fillers, school rewards and young fans of Wicked or fantasy-themed stationery.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS & DESIGN: Made from durable paper, cardboard, rubber and plastic with bright, bold Wicked-themed colours. A great collector’s item for fans of the musical and magical storytelling.
description: Add a touch of Wicked magic to every page with this official Wizard of Oz Diary Set – the perfect stationery gift for creative kids. Designed for young fans of Wicked, this beautifully themed diary set combines vibrant artwork, imaginative accessories and everything needed for writing, doodling and journaling. The hard-cover diary includes lined pages for thoughts, drawings and daily notes, while the included gel pens with decorative toppers bring extra colour and fun to every entry. A full sheet of Wicked stickers, decorative embellishments and green witch hat sticky notes allow children to customise their pages and express their personality. Whether used at home, at school or on the go, this set inspires creativity, confidence and magical self-expression. Packaged in a 20cm x 20cm box, it makes an excellent Christmas stocking filler, birthday gift, party bag treat or addition to any girl’s stationery collection. Suitable for ages 5+, the Wicked Diary Set is a charming keepsake for fans of the Wizard of Oz and anyone who loves imaginative writing and crafting.
